VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: battery powered
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android is powered by a rechargeable cell array rather than a reactor. It is far cheaper to build, but the charge drains over a few days of operation and has to be topped up at a powered android stand. A flat android shuts down where it stands and trickle-charges very slowly on its own until someone hauls it to a stand. An android without a working power core cannot operate in any capacity.
